target.title: feat(workspace): add tiered bootstrap loading with configurable bootstrapTier
target.body:
Closes #22438

## Motivation

Bootstrap files consume LLM tokens on every session. For users with large workspaces, loading all files into every session â€” including sub-agents and cron jobs â€” wastes context window budget on files the agent never references. This PR introduces tiered loading so users can control how much context each session type receives, **reducing unnecessary token usage** while preserving persona consistency where needed.

## What

Introduces a three-tier bootstrap file loading system (`minimal` | `standard` | `full`) with a new `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` configuration option. Both the `minimal` and `standard` tiers exclude hook-loaded extras (e.g. `packages/*/AGENTS.md` from the `bootstrap-extra-files` hook); `full` keeps everything.

## Why

The current binary split (main=all, subagent/cron=minimal) doesn't support use cases where subagents need persona context or where main sessions should be lightweight. This adds a clean, backward-compatible middle ground that lets users optimize their token budget per session type.

## How

- **`resolveBootstrapTier(sessionKey, tierOverride)`** â€” resolves the effective tier from session type + optional config override.
- **`filterBootstrapFilesForSession(files, sessionKey, tierOverride)`** â€” extended with optional tier parameter (backward compatible â€” no tierOverride = existing session-type heuristic).
- **Hook-source guard** â€” both `minimal` and `standard` filters check `file.source !== "hook"` before allowlist matching, so a hook-loaded extra whose basename happens to be in the allowlist cannot slip in. This preserves the natural `minimal âŠ‚ standard âŠ‚ full` inclusion order on the real hook path.
- **Config** â€” `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` in the zod schema, TypeScript types, labels, and help text.

The `source: "root" | "hook"` provenance field on `WorkspaceBootstrapFile` is the discriminator: root-level bootstrap files keep flowing through `minimal` and `standard`; per-package extras registered via the `bootstrap-extra-files` hook are only reachable through `full`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: tiered bootstrap loading â€” `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier` (`minimal` | `standard` | `full`) controls which workspace files are injected into each session's context window. Closes #22438. After the latest fix (`2a3faf3151`), the `minimal` tier also drops hook-loaded extras, restoring the natural `minimal âŠ‚ standard âŠ‚ full` inclusion order on the real hook path.

Real environment tested: macOS 26.0 (arm64) on Apple Silicon, Node 24.13.0, pnpm 11.1.0, against the fork branch tip at commit `2a3faf3151`. A reproduction harness at the repo root (`repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts`, not committed) imports the real `src/agents/workspace.ts` from this branch and invokes `filterBootstrapFilesForSession` and `resolveBootstrapTier` against an explicit `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` containing both root-loaded files and hook-loaded extras whose basenames collide with the root allowlist.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `git checkout 2a3faf3151` (this PR's head)
2. `pnpm install --prefer-offline`
3. Author the reproduction harness at the repo root, importing `./src/agents/workspace.js` and calling the exported functions directly with a `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` shaped like a real workspace (root files + two hook-sourced `packages/*/AGENTS.md` entries).
4. `node ./node_modules/.bin/tsx repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts`

Evidence after fix:

Terminal capture, run live against commit `2a3faf3151`:

```text
$ node ./node_modules/.bin/tsx repro-tiered-bootstrap.mts

===== resolveBootstrapTier(sessionKey, tierOverride) =====
  (no sessionKey)       default=standard  override=minimalâ†’minimal   override=standardâ†’standard  override=fullâ†’full
  main session          default=standard  override=minimalâ†’minimal   override=standardâ†’standard  override=fullâ†’full
  subagent session      default=minimal   override=minimalâ†’minimal   override=standardâ†’standard  override=fullâ†’full
  cron session          default=minimal   override=minimalâ†’minimal   override=standardâ†’standard  override=fullâ†’full

===== filterBootstrapFilesForSession â€” DEFAULTS (no tierOverride) =====
main      , no override (=> standard)  â†’  8 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]

subagent  , no override (=> minimal)  â†’  5 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]

cron      , no override (=> minimal)  â†’  5 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]

===== filterBootstrapFilesForSession â€” WITH agents.defaults.bootstrapTier =====
subagent  , tier=standard  â†’  8 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]

cron      , tier=full  â†’  10 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/TOOLS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/SOUL.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/IDENTITY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/USER.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/HEARTBEAT.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/MEMORY.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/api/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/web/AGENTS.md  [hook]

===== REGRESSION GUARD (hook-source exclusion): standard drops source='hook' =====
input  (1 root + 2 hook, basenames collide with root allowlist)  â†’  3 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/core/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/persona/SOUL.md  [hook]

standard tier output (keeps only the root AGENTS.md)  â†’  1 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]

full     tier output (keeps everything)  â†’  3 file(s):
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/AGENTS.md  [root]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/core/AGENTS.md  [hook]
    - /tmp/proof-workspace/packages/persona/SOUL.md  [hook]

===== BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY (no tierOverride passed) =====
  sess=agent:main:main              â†’ 8 files
  sess=agent:main:subagent:task42   â†’ 5 files
  sess=agent:main:cron:nightly      â†’ 5 files

Done.
```

Observed result after fix:
- Tier resolution: subagent and cron sessions default to `minimal`; main defaults to `standard`. Any session honors an explicit `tierOverride`.
- `minimal` (subagent / cron default) returns exactly the 5 root files matching the minimal allowlist. Hook-loaded `packages/api/AGENTS.md` and `packages/web/AGENTS.md` are correctly excluded by the new `file.source !== "hook"` guard committed in `2a3faf3151`. Inclusion order is preserved: subagent default returns 5, override â†’ standard returns 8 (superset), override â†’ full returns 10 (superset).
- `standard` drops hook-loaded extras even when basenames collide with the root allowlist (1 file out of 3 in the regression scenario).
- `full` keeps every loaded file (10 of 10 in the full set).
- Backward compatibility row: omitting `tierOverride` yields the documented session-type defaults â€” main 8, subagent 5, cron 5.

What was not tested: glob expansion of `loadExtraBootstrapFilesWithDiagnostics` against a live filesystem (the harness supplies the `WorkspaceBootstrapFile[]` directly to exercise the filter under study). No behavior with non-default agent roots was exercised â€” the harness uses the canonical session-key shapes `agent:main:{main,subagent,cron}`.

## Testing (supplemental)

`src/agents/workspace.tiered-bootstrap.test.ts` (14 it-blocks, all passing locally) covers the tier resolution and filtering behavior at the unit level, including the explicit `minimal âŠ‚ standard âŠ‚ full` inclusion guard added with the `2a3faf3151` fix. `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts` exercises the end-to-end hook path against real temp directories, including the updated assertion that hook-loaded `packages/persona/SOUL.md` does not slip into a subagent session.

## Changes

- `src/agents/workspace.ts` â€” `BootstrapTier` type, `MINIMAL_BOOTSTRAP_ALLOWLIST`, `STANDARD_BOOTSTRAP_ALLOWLIST`, `resolveBootstrapTier`, and `filterBootstrapFilesForSession`. Both `minimal` and `standard` filters apply the `file.source !== "hook"` guard.
- `src/agents/bootstrap-files.ts` â€” `source: "root"` provenance field on the root-load path.
- `src/agents/workspace.tiered-bootstrap.test.ts` â€” 14 it-blocks; new minimal-tier regression added alongside the existing standard-tier one.
- `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.ts` â€” re-applies the tier filter after extras are appended, honoring the configured `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier`.
- `src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts` â€” refreshed subagent assertion to expect the corrected hook-exclusion behavior.
- `src/config/schema.help.ts` / `schema.labels.ts` / `types.agent-defaults.ts` / `zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts` â€” config plumbing for `agents.defaults.bootstrapTier`.
